title: Floral Creamy Portuguese Cheese Grill
description: A singleperson, Jainfriendly grilled tomato and ColbyJack cheese plate infused with fragrant lavender, rosemary, and edible flowers for a burst of Portuguese flavor.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium heat.
Slice the tomato in half horizontally, keeping the skins intact to mimic foil wrapping.

In a small bowl, combine the shredded Colby‑Jack cheese, crumbled feta, dried lavender buds, minced rosemary, lemon juice, chopped basil, salt, and pepper; mix until the cheese is evenly coated with the herbs and spices.
Place the tomato halves, cut side up, on the grill. Brush the cut sides lightly with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the tomatoes for 3–4 minutes, then flip them carefully. Spoon the herb‑infused cheese mixture over the cut side of each tomato half.
Close the grill lid (or cover with foil) and grill for an additional 4–5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
While the cheese melts, lightly toast the fresh thyme sprig on the grill for about 30 seconds to release its aroma.
Remove the tomatoes from the grill, place them on a serving plate, garnish with the toasted thyme sprig and a handful of edible flowers, and serve immediately.
